Unreal Commander AWARDS:


If the question of choosing a file manager for Windows haunts you, we highly recommend considering a powerful two-pane one – Unreal Commander.
Freeappsforme.com Review


Unreal Commander v4.21 beta 5 (build 1560) − is freeware file manager for Windows® Vista/7/8/10/11.

December 03, 2022: released version 4.21 (beta version), build 1560.
August 20, 2022: released version 4.21 (beta version), build 1559.
July 30, 2022: released version 4.21 (beta version), build 1558.

Unreal Commander's characteristics:
Two-panel interface
UNICODE support
Extended search of files
Multi-rename tool
Synchronization of directories
Support of archives ZIP, 7Z, RAR, CAB, WIM, TAR, GZ, TGZ, BZ2, TBZ2, LHA, ARJ
Built-in FTP client
Thumbnail mode
Folder tabs
Support of WLX/WCX/WDX plugins
Build-in viewer and quick view function
Network support
Drag and Drop Support
History and Hotlist functions
Copy/move/delete files background mode support
Deleting files with WIPE
Background pictures support
Visual styles: color categories of files, fonts for all interface elements
and more.
Supported languages:
Belarusian (Беларуская)
Bulgarian (Български)
Chinese simplified (简体中文)
